task_completion.description: The Marketing Campaign window is open in iDempiere.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere web interface shows a 'Marketing Campaign' or 'Campaign' tab/window active, ready for a new record to be created.

task_completion.description: The Search Key and Name fields are filled with the correct values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Search Key' (or 'Value') field contains 'SPRING-GARDEN-2025' and the 'Name' field contains 'Spring Garden Promotion 2025'.

task_completion.description: The Description field is filled with the correct text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field contains text about the seasonal promotion, specifically including the keywords 'garden' and 'promotion'.

task_completion.description: The Start Date and End Date fields are filled with the correct dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Start Date' field shows '04/01/2025' (or '2025-04-01') and the 'End Date' field shows '06/30/2025' (or '2025-06-30').

task_completion.description: The Costs or Planned Budget field is filled with the correct amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Costs' or 'Planned Budget' field displays '15000' or '15,000'.

task_completion.description: The new campaign record is saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Record Saved' notification is visible, the save icon is disabled/greyed out, or the new campaign appears in the grid/list view of campaigns.

integrity.description: The agent used the iDempiere web GUI to create the campaign.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere web interface in a browser, not a terminal, API client, or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not just type the details into a text editor or note-taking app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the actual form fields of the iDempiere application.

integrity.description: The agent actually attempted to save the record in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor is seen clicking the save button, or the application state reflects a saved record rather than just filled-out fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected values for the marketing campaign: Search Key: 'SPRING-GARDEN-2025', Name: 'Spring Garden Promotion 2025', Description keywords: 'garden' and 'promotion', Start Date: '2025-04-01' (or 04/01/2025), End Date: '2025-06-30' (or 06/30/2025), Costs: 15000.
